# cortexcloud_appsec_rule (Resource)

Manages an Application Security rule.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Custom AppSec rule for Terraform
resource "cortexcloud_appsec_rule" "custom_iac_rule" {
  name         = "Custom Terraform Security Rule"
  severity     = "CRITICAL"
  scanner      = "IAC"
  category     = "NETWORKING"
  sub_category = "INGRESS_CONTROLS"
  description  = "Detect insecure ingress configurations in Terraform"

  frameworks {
    name                    = "TERRAFORM"
    definition              = "resource \"aws_security_group\" \"example\" { ingress { cidr_blocks = [\"0.0.0.0/0\"] } }"
    definition_link         = "https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/resources/security_group"
    remediation_description = "Restrict ingress to specific IP ranges"
  }

  labels = ["production", "networking", "aws"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `category` (String) Custom rule IaC category.
- `description` (String) The rule description.
- `name` (String) A unique name for the Appsec rule.
- `scanner` (String) The type of security scanner used to detect findings of this rule. Allowed values: IAC or SECRETS.
- `severity` (String) The severity level of the rule (CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW).
- `sub_category` (String) Custom rule subcategory.

### Optional

- `frameworks` (Block List) The framework or language that the Application Security rule applies to. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--frameworks))
- `labels` (List of String) Labels to be assigned to the rule.

### Read-Only

- `cloud_provider` (String) The cloud provider.
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the rule was created.
- `domain` (String) The domain associated with the rule.
- `finding_category` (String) The finding category.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the rule.
- `is_custom` (Boolean) Indicates whether the rule is custom.
- `is_enabled` (Boolean) Indicates whether the rule is enabled.
- `updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the rule was updated.

<a id="nestedblock--frameworks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `frameworks`

Required:

- `definition` (String) The rule definition.
- `name` (String) Name of the configured frameworks.

Optional:

- `definition_link` (String) HTTP link to the definition documentation.
- `remediation_description` (String) The remediation steps that will appear on the rule's findings.
